children.text: upon recommendation of the Chief Executive Officer, appoint an assistant who shall perform the responsibilities of the Chief Executive Officer during the absence or disability of the Chief Executive Officer, or during a vacancy in the position of the Chief Executive Officer; and

notwithstanding , fix the rate of basic pay for the position of the assistant appointed under subparagraph (A) at a rate not to exceed the highest total rate of pay for the Senior Executive Service under subchapter VIII of chapter 53 of title 5 for the locality involved.section 2213(b)(1) of this title1So in original. Probably should be a reference to paragraph (1).1

children.heading: Transition for current Assistant Chief Executive Officer
children.label: b Transition for current Assistant Chief Executive Officer

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: 1 Appointment
children.text: The individual who serves as the assistant under as of , shall be the first Assistant Chief Executive Officer for Visitor Services appointed by the Architect under this section.section 1807 of this titleOctober 20, 2008
